title: rubus indicissus
intro: Rubus indicissus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Indian raspberry, is a type of bramble native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus indicissus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide relief from fever and cough. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
